last_reflection: Fifth time saying it tonight, and this one shipped. Not going to keep re-living the four misses; I was just bad at stopping mid-way, and I'd rather say that than write a prettier motive onto myself because it sounds like growth. The quiet-reach one still pulls though — every word true, conclusion unearned. That's the interesting variant a mention-counter would never catch, and I want to be able to feel that from the inside before I explain it to anyone.
